segments.lat: S. v. b. e. v. nos cotidie tabellarios nostros exspectamus. qui si venerint, fortasse erimus certiores quid nobis faciendum sit, faciemusque te statim certiorem. valetudinem tuam cura diligenter. vale . K. Septemb.
segments.eng: If you are well, it is well; I am well. Day after day we are waiting for our couriers. If they come, perhaps we shall be in a position to know what we have to do, and shall let you know at once. Take careful care of your health. Farewell. The Kalends of September.
